reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: D-FUMT₈ 自体の SELF 値 — 自分自身を分類する自己参照体系

falsifiability: 8 値構造が冗長 (例えば 7 値で同等以上の表現力) と証明されれば改訂候補
culturalNote: Rei-AIOS 固有。3 値論理 / Kleene / Belnap 4-valued の延長 + 仏教 4 値否定の影響

description.ja: TRUE/FALSE/BOTH/NEITHER/INFINITY/ZERO/FLOWING/SELF の 8 値論理体系。Rei-AIOS 全モジュールの基盤
description.en: Eight-valued logic system: TRUE/FALSE/BOTH/NEITHER/INFINITY/ZERO/FLOWING/SELF. Foundation of all Rei-AIOS modules.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 8値論理は真偽二項対立を超え、自己参照によって閉じた知識体系を形成する。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><polygon points='0 0, 10 3, 0 6' fill='#00d4ff'/></defs><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='45' fill='none' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='35' fill='none' stroke='#00ff88' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><g id='octagon'><circle cx='50' cy='15' r='3' fill='#00d4ff'/><circle cx='72' cy='22' r='3' fill='#ec4899'/><circle cx='80' cy='45' r='3' fill='#f59e0b'/><circle cx='72' cy='68' r='3' fill='#ffd700'/><circle cx='50' cy='80' r='3' fill='#00ff88'/><circle cx='28' cy='68' r='3' fill='#7c3aed'/><circle cx='20' cy='45' r='3' fill='#ec4899'/><circle cx='28' cy='22' r='3' fill='#f59e0b'/></g><path d='M 50 15 L 72 22 L 80 45 L 72 68 L 50 80 L 28 68 L 20 45 L 28 22 Z' fill='none' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='1.5' opacity='0.6'/><path d='M 50 15 Q 50 50 50 80' fill='none' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='2,2' opacity='0.5'/><path d='M 20 45 Q 50 50 80 45' fill='none' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='2,2' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='6' fill='none' stroke='#ffd700' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 50 50 L 56 56' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='1.5' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)' opacity='0.7'/><text x='50' y='95' text-anchor='middle' font-size='8' fill='#7c3aed' font-family='monospace'>D-FUMT₈ SELF</text></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 外の8値の環は論理値の多元性を、中心の自己参照ループは体系の再帰的閉包性を示す。
